title: Sprite Forge
description: AI-powered 2D sprite pipeline: anchor sheets, paper-doll layers, 8 animation cycles, DINOv2 identity scoring with auto-regen, HD-2D depth/normal/emission maps, palette quantization (PICO-8/NES/GBA), one-click palette swaps, WASD sandbox, and multi-character scene compositor. Fork of 0x0funky/agent-sprite-forge (MIT).
features: Paper-doll layered generation (base, clothing, accessories, weapons, props)
DINOv2/ViT identity scoring with auto-regen below threshold
8 animation cycles (walk, run, idle, attack, hurt, jump, cast, death)
HD-2D depth, normal, and emission map export per frame
K-means palette quantization to PICO-8, NES, GBA palettes
One-click palette swaps (Player 2, Ice, Fire, Shadow Clone)
WASD playable sandbox with shareable URL
Multi-character scene compositor with generated backgrounds
